summary: Iteration 2: verified the 3 new Pro-only AI endpoints (cv-rewrite, interview-prep, jd-scanner) and the AITools.jsx tab additions. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed including 401-without-auth on all 3 endpoints, 403 'Pro-only ... £7/month ... Upgrade' for free users, 400 empty-JD validation on jd-scanner, successful Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls for Pro users (each produces structured markdown with ## sections), ai_usage logging verified per kind (cv_rewrite/interview_prep/jd_scanner), existing /api/ai/optimize-resume still works for free, reviews POST is Pro-gated and persists, and DELETE /api/account fully wipes users/sessions/applications/ai_usage. Frontend: AI Tools page renders 6 tabs (3 free + 3 Pro with lock icons). Free user clicking CV Rewrite / Interview Prep / JD Scanner sees the amber Lock screen with 'Upgrade to Pro' button linking to https://cagdasozturk.gumroad.com/l/irrlrl. Pro user sees the working forms; submitting CV Rewrite produced ~5.8 KB of structured markdown including ## Professional Summary section.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 619 lines; with the 3 new Pro endpoints + reviews + delete-account it is approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider splitting into routers (auth/applications/documents/ai/reviews/billing/account) before the next feature.

require_pro() is fine but the same 'Pro-only ... £7/month ... Upgrade' string is now duplicated in /api/ai/cv-rewrite, /api/ai/interview-prep, /api/ai/jd-scanner via the helper (good, no actual duplication) and also slightly differently worded in /api/reviews ('Only Pro users can submit reviews. Upgrade...'). Consider routing /api/reviews through require_pro() too for consistent error copy.

/api/ai/jd-scanner validates empty job_description (good), but /api/ai/cv-rewrite does not validate empty resume / target_role — pydantic only enforces presence, not non-empty. A free-text submission with whitespace-only resume would hit Claude unnecessarily. Cheap to add: a .strip() check like jd-scanner does.

ai_usage is logged AFTER call_claude succeeds, so failed Claude calls don't consume quota — good, but for the 3 Pro endpoints there is no quota check at all (require_pro short-circuits and Pro plan has no daily cap). That matches the product spec ('Pro = unlimited') but if abuse becomes a concern, add a per-day soft cap on Pro endpoints.
Tabs use lucide Lock inside the TabsTrigger label for free users — accessibility-wise the lock icon has no aria-label/sr-only text indicating 'Pro feature locked'; minor a11y improvement.
AITools.jsx now has 6 tabs of repeated form patterns (~280 lines). Extract a generic <AIToolForm> component to reduce duplication across the 3 Pro tabs.
Existing iteration-1 critical comments still apply (sync requests in async /api/auth/session; missing MongoDB indexes on user_sessions.session_token + applications.user_id).
test_credentials: Per /app/auth_testing.md — seeded ephemeral free+pro users via mongosh with session_token cookie (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=None) on app-dashboard-pro-3.preview.emergentagent.com. All test data cleaned up after run.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates module-scoped TEST_it2_free / TEST_it2_pro users via mongo and tears them down. Frontend test seeded ui_free_<ts> / ui_pro_<ts> users; cleaned up at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-2 backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2_pro_features.py (independent from iteration-1 backend_test.py — both can run together). Each Claude call takes 5–15s so total pytest run is ~75s. The 3 Pro endpoints are: POST /api/ai/cv-rewrite {resume,target_role,job_description?}, POST /api/ai/interview-prep {role,job_description?}, POST /api/ai/jd-scanner {resume,job_description}. To test free-gate, use plan='free'; to test working flow, seed plan='pro'. Reviews POST is also Pro-gated. DELETE /api/account works and invalidates the session token. Frontend lock-screen test ids: upgrade-ai-cv-rewrite-btn, upgrade-interview-prep-questions-btn, upgrade-job-description-scanner-btn; Pro form test ids: rw-resume/rw-role/rw-btn, ip-role/ip-btn, sc-resume/sc-jd/sc-btn.
